post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests

get.description: Get all highlight metrics for a given activity.
Fuzzy search location names in the database
Get all tags for a user
Fuzzy search tag names in the database
Fuzzy search tag category names in the database
Get all tags in a certain category

delete.description:
Deleta a category. If cascade is True, all tags connected to the category will also
be deleted. If cascalade is False, the category_id of all tags connected to the
category will be set to None.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Duration of the activity. If string, encoded as ISO8601

moving_duration.title: Moving Duration
moving_duration.description: Duration of the activity excluding all points w/o movement. If string, encoded as ISO8601

avg_speed.title: Avg Speed
avg_speed.description: Average speed over the duration of the activity in km/h

avg_heartrate.title: Avg Heartrate
avg_heartrate.description: Average heartrate over the duration of the activity in bpm

avg_power.title: Avg Power
avg_power.description: Average power over the duration of the activity in watt

max_speed.title: Max Speed
max_speed.description: Max speed over the duration of the activity in km/h

max_heartrate.title: Max Heartrate
max_heartrate.description: Max heartrate over the duration of the activity in bpm

max_power.title: Max Power
max_power.description: Max power over the duration of the activity in watt

equipment_ids.title: Equipment Ids
equipment_ids.description: Optional equipment ids that should be added to the set

excluded_activity_types.title: Excluded Activity Types
excluded_activity_types.description: List of (type_id, sub_type_id) tuples to exclude from heatmap. sub_type_id can be None to exclude entire type.

StatsMetric.title: StatsMetric
StatsMetric.description: Base metric unit to reuse across subtypes, types, and totals.

TypeStats.title: TypeStats
TypeStats.description: Stats for a specific Activity Type (e.g. Cycling), broken down by subtype.
